feed.title: AI Security Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: AIセキュリティに関する日次ニュースダイジェスト - 研究・ニュース・政策動向を自動収集・要約

entry.title: 36 Malicious npm Packages Exploited Redis, PostgreSQL to Deploy Persistent Implants
entry.content:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered 36 malicious packages in the npm registry that are disguised as Strapi CMS plugins but come with different payloads to facilitate Redis and PostgreSQL exploit

Source: The Hacker News

news

entry.title: Fortinet Patches Actively Exploited CVE-2026-35616 in FortiClient EMS
entry.content:
Fortinet has released out-of-band patches for a critical security flaw impacting FortiClient EMS that it said has been exploited in the wild. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-3561

Source: The Hacker News

news

entry.title: research-llm-apis 2026-04-04
entry.content:
<p><strong>Release:</strong> <a href="https://github.com/simonw/research-llm-apis/releases/tag/2026-04-04">research-llm-apis 2026-04-04</a></p> <p>I'm working on a <a href="https://github.com/simo

Source: Simon Willison's Weblog

ai_commentary

entry.title: Axios npm hack used fake Teams error fix to hijack maintainer account
entry.content:
The maintainers of the popular Axios HTTP client have published a detailed post-mortem describing how one of its developers was targeted by a social engineering campaign believed to have been conducte

Source: Bleeping Computer

news
